rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt For Patricia Gridley'S Refusal To Comply With Court'S Order Granting Motion To Compel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: The application for an order to show cause is granted. Patricia Gridley must show cause in writing no later than June 19, 2012 why she should not be held in contempt for her failure to comply with the Court¿s Order Granting Motion to Compel and should not be ordered to pay $1000 plus the moving parties¿ attorney fees in connection with this contempt proceeding. A hearing on the order to show cause will be held July 6, 2012 in Department 204 of this Court at 9:30 a.m. The moving parties are directed to prepare and submit for the Court¿s signature an Order to Show Cause consistent with this ruling. Any party who wishes to argue this matter must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, May 29, 2012.
